wordplay_note: King of the mad — leads rebel androids
card_description: Roy Baty (meaning "Roy = king; Baty echoes batty (mad)") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Do Androids Dream of Electric Sheep?*. Leader of the fugitive android group who has killed humans to survive. Name note: King of the mad — leads rebel androids. Represents the android's existential rage against a brief and predetermined lifespan. First appears in *Do Androids Dream of Electric Sheep?*.
first_work: Do Androids Dream of Electric Sheep?
work_list: Do Androids Dream of Electric Sheep?
